titleStmt.title: SII 20.87: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 87. (B.K. No. 74 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: This record, lower portion of which is lost, seems to register a gift to god Sōmēśvara of Kalkere by Jayasinga, a subordinate of Daṇḍanāyaka Gōvindarasa who was administering Banavāsi—12,000 and the Vaḍḍarāvuḷa taxes under Mahāpradhāna Daṇḍanāyaka Anantapālayya who was governing the Two 600 districts, Banavāsi12,000, Palasige-12,000, and the Vaḍḍarāvuḷa and Achchu-pannāya taxes of the Seven and a half lakh country. It contains a description of Gōvindarasa. The details of the date are all lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmadamarēṁdraruṁdraśikhāmaṇigaṇataruṇakiraṇaparibriḍacaraṇaṁ sōmārkkānaḷanayanaṁ sōmēśvaradēvarige
sāśvata sukhamaṁ © namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē ©
girijāśriṁgārēnduṟpravarddhayatyāntaraṁ manōvārddhiṁ suradanujārādhyasya nayasya vaḻpārvvatīramaṇaḥ ©
svasti śrīvasitārppitavistīrṇnōrasthaḷaṁ ripubrajamastaṁnyastacaraṇaṁ samastajanastuta śitakīrttivikramādityanripaṁ
svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta rōttarā
bhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © tatpādapadmamadhukaranutpāṭita
baḷavadahitabāhubaḷaṁ vidvatpūjyaṁ guṇaratnasaritpatiyenisidananantapāḷacamūpati patihitadoḷe
llavaggada patihitanatisucigaḷenisi negaḷdavaroḷu mikkatisuci dakṣarenipparoḷatidakṣanananta pāḷadaṇḍādhīśaṁ
sādhisi saptamāḷavamanatta himaṁbaramitta dakṣiṇāsādharaṇīsvaraṁ jaḷadhivāyvinegaṁ bedaṟaṭṭi vipravidyādharanapratarkkyabhujacakrama
nīgaḷanaṁtapāḷadaṇḍādhipanēṁ negarttevaḍedirddanō cakriya daṇḍanātharoḷ © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍa
daṇḍanāyakaṁ vibudhavaradāyakaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ nuḍidu mattenna gōtrapavitraṁ parāṁganāputraṁ tureyarēvantaṁ vairikritānta sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁga nā
mādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bāṇasaverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakana nantapāḷayyaṁgaḷeraḍaṟunūṟumaṁ banavasepannicchāsiramuṁ
palisigepannicchāsiramuṁ vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkamumaṁ saptārddhalakkeyaccu pannāyamumaṁ paḍedu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ pratipāḷisuttamire © tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi © śrīvanitākucasaṁbhritapīvaravakṣasthaḷaṁ lasadguṇamaṇimāḷāviḷasita nenēnegaḷdanō gōvindaṁ sakaḷa vibudhajanatānadda © ©
mundāntarisainyakke mukundaṁ kaṇsōltu banda paravaniteyoḷaṁtondaṁ śrī nelasirppara vindaṁ gōvindanakhiḷavibudhānanda © Ittu tavadoḍamī jaga vi
direttidaḍaṁ kādi tavada ciraṁtanagāyattamiveraḍaṟoḷaṁ lōkōttamanādaṁ dharitri yoḷu gōvinda © Āmmāppeṁbī yeraḍaṟa permmege ne
leyāgi jagadamanujarggītaṁ nūrmmaḍiyaynūrmmaḍisāsirmmaḍi migilādananupamaṁ gōvinda © kṣitiyoḷagī gōvindananitara
camūnātharentumēṁ pōltaparē vitaraṇada guṇadasauryada patikāryyada calada balada mahimōnnatiyoḷ © pisaṇara hi
tīrccuvanasadaḷavene kaṭṭidalaganāḷdana maneyoḷu pa tīrcu vaneseva kṣayanidhiyanarttiyiṁ gōvinda © sāntavira
ṟadidirānta virōdhigaḷaniṟida svaṁberasārddante tējava vāḷtetūntaḍe māṇdapane samaradoḷu gōvinda © Arivīrabhaṭa
bhīkarabhujaniśrīṇimārggadiṁ svarggamanaccariyenala vaṁ saṁgaradoḷu raṇaraṁgabhairavaṁ gōvinda © birudara java
ra gōḷmuri malevara māri gaṇḍamaccaradoḷu maccarisuvara mirttu sauryyā bharaṇaṁ raṇaraṁgabhairavaṁ gōvinda © raṇaraṁgabhai
ravaṁ guṇamaṇimaṇḍananaṇnanaṁkakāṟaṁ subhaṭāgraṇiyene negaḷdaṁ dhāriṇiyoḷu gōvinda nahitadanuja mukunda © Adaṭi
noḷaṇminoḷāyadoḷodavida niccaṭikeyoḷ peṟarssamanilleṁbudanenisuva subhaṭaṁ jita kadanaṁ raṇaraṁgabairavaṁ gōvinda © tisuḷaṁ kū
yurigaṇmisuva kūrddāḍeyeṁbavaṁ bhōṁkene tōṟisuvaṁ raṇadoḷu raṇarasikaṁ raṇaraṁgabhairavaṁ govinda © posanettaraṇpu nettarvvasiva sirōmā
ruḷa jinnavīraṁ vagurvvise raṇadoḷarttiyiṁ krīḍisuvaṁ raṇaraṁgabhairavaṁ gōvinda © ghaḷilene tāgida ripubaḷadoḷakeyuvāḷaridirddu tividaḷmi
kālduḷiyoḷaḷiṟāge tōrttaḷaduḷivaṁ raṇaraṁgabhairavaṁ gōvinda © Avayavadiṁ gajāsurananāsuravāgire sīrḷdu koṁda bhairavanuṟadandhakāsurana
puravāgi poraḷci konda bhairavanadaṭaṁ jaṭāsurananāsuravāgire tāgi konda bhairavaniva neṁbagurvvina bhaṭaṁ raṇadoḷu raṇaraṁgabhairava © śaraṇemageṁdu ba
ndaḍaṟiyēṁ maredāntaḍe bhāḷadoḷ podaḷdurivurigaṇnanugraphaṇikuṁḍaḷamuṁ kiviyoḷka rābjadoḷu suruciraśūḷamaṁ miṟupa dāḍegaḷaṁ nijavaktra
doḷ vibhīkaramene tōṟuguṁ samararaṁgadoḷī raṇaraṁgabhairavaṁ © bavaramanolla dirddhaḍaṟiye samavāyadinoldanappaḍāhavadoḷarātisēnege
bhayajvaramormmeye puṭṭi tōrppanā nevadoḷaḍaḍaṁ ḍamarukōgrakarāḷakapōḷaśūḷa bhāḷavipuḷalōḷalōcanavijriṁbhaṇamaṁ raṇaraṁga
bhairava © Urivurigaṇnanīḷdarivolāge bhayaṁkarakōpavahnibhīkarakaraśūḷamaṁkaravagurvvi sutirppa karāsi tāne pōltire gaṇamā
ge saḷbhaṭagaṇaṁ ripusēnege pōlkumugrasaṁgaradhareyoḷmahāpraḷayabhairavanaṁ raṇaraṁga bhairava © Aribhaṭaruṇḍamāḷevaḷanikki tadī
yakapōḷadoḷmiduḷverasida nettaraṁ suṟidu kattigeyaṁ jaḍiyutte kālagaggaraduliyalke kūḍe maruḷāge niśācari sorkki pāḍe bhīka
rataramāge narttisuva bhairavanī raṇaraṁgabhairava © kādadiriṁ kaḍaṁgadirivurkkadiriṁ taledōṟi mīṟi caḷādapirantadaṁ girivadaṁgirivadaṁgirivoṁ
baḍavuḍe jūdādudu tittuvittu virivittiridittiriveṁba kāḷe kāpādudu vairigaḷgenisidaṁ jaga doḷ raṇaraṁgabhairava © baṟasiḍilaṁ tuḍuṁku
va madāndhagajakkidirāgikoḷkaḷamuṟiduṟadiṁda pervvuliyamīseyoḷuyyalanāḍuvoṁdu pēraṟikeya bīranāntoḍaṁ madevesagoṇḍa
ḍe nettaraṁ nelakkeṟeyade māṇgumē samararaṁgadoḷī raṇaraṁgabhairavaṁ © kaṭakaṁ jī yene nacci mecci poredāḷdaṁ bennoḷiddorme sadbhaṭacūḍāma
ṇi bāḷi birddanene ma ggegeyvaṁkadekkaṭigarmmiḷmiḷa nōḍe koṁdanadaṭiṁ śubhrābhra saṁdōha saṁkaṭamaṁ cākada kōṭeyiṁ jananutaṁ gōvi
ndadaṇḍādhipa © Idu durggatrayavintidaṁ marutanuṁ nāgāriyuṁ kādi koḷvudasā dhāraṇaveṁba kiḷgiḷamanā cakrēśvaraṁ mecce pattida
nārddettidaneydidaṁ sarigegeydirddaṁ jagaṁ nōḍe māḍidanatyadbhutamappa baṁṭutanamaṁ gōvindadaṇḍādhipa © jaḷadurggaṁ giridurggavante vanadu
rggaṁ tānenalsanda kiḷgiḷamaṁ dōrvvaḷadiṁde patti bharadiṁdaṁ mēle bīḷvānegalgaḷa kūraṁbina kōḷge saṁcaḷisadārddantantetti vikrāntadoṁdaḷavaṁ tāṁ
meṟedaṁ palarppogaḷvinaṁ gōvindadaṇḍādhipa © mogasalkārggavaḷeṁbaveṁbinega vetteccummenettoyduvaṁbugaḷaṁ bācisi pāyvaḍēṁ kaṇi
ya kallaṁ kaṇḍu kaṭṭaṇminiṁdagaḷaṁbhōnidhiyāge saṁda jaḷadurggaṁ jūvamaṁ koṇḍu gaṇḍaguṇakkāspadamāda jeṭṭiganivaṁ gōvindadaṇḍādhipa .
Anatārātiyanōvadikki jayamaṁ tāḷdalsamartthātmenāvano gōvindane sārdda śiṣṭareduṟaṁ tāḷdalsamartthātmanāvano gōvindane
kīrttiyaṁ paḍedu jīyayyeṁbinaṁ saṁdanāvano gōvindane matte matte peṟaraṁ kāṇēṁ mahīcakradoḷ © vacana © mattamā mahānu
bhāvanaudāryyaprabhāvamaṁ pēḷvaḍe © praśnōttara © visasanadalli muntaṇaḍiyaṁ sale pintaḍiyiṭṭu pōgadoṁdesakamanāntavaṁge pesarā
vudadētaṟa mēlevirddu tānoseyisuva priyaṁ muvigaḷaṁ kivigaṁ visarārppinēḷgeyiṁ vasumatiyoḷvicārisuvoḍārddore
yaṁ raṇaraṁgabhairava © manumārggaṁ kēśavaṁgaṁ sujanajanani nīlabbegaṁ puṭṭidaṁ siṣṭanivāsaṁ dāsanayyaṁ janakavibhugamabjākṣi sā
vitrigaṁ nandane tannaṁ pettatāyyauvanaguṇavati sōrabbeyendaḍe gōvindane dhanyaṁ bāppu pārāśarakulatiḷakaṁ daṇḍanāthāgragaṇyaṁ [.]
svasti samastaguṇagaṇābharaṇanuṁ vibudhajanaśaraṇanuṁ nijavisuddhakīrtticaṁdrikāprabhāvavikasitajagadvaḷayakairavanuṁ
raṇaraṁgabhairavanuṁ sakaḷasukavijanakaḷpabhūjanuṁ viśamahayārūḍhavatsarājanuṁ vīralakṣīnivāsanu Anantapāḷa
pravādāsāditādhikāralakṣmīviḷāsanumenisida mahāpracaṁṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ gōvindarasarvvanavāse pannicchāsiramumaṁ
mēlvaṭṭeya vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkamumaṁ paḍedu duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanakramadiṁ pratipāḷisuttamirddu
tatpādapadmārādhaka kalkeṟeya jayasiṁgaseṭṭiyanvayaventeṁdaḍe © Anaghaṁ mārttaṇḍaṁga vinayāṁbu gaṁ puṭṭidanoḷvina kaṇi guṇagaṇanidhi
sajjanavinutaṁ nābhiseṭṭi nijakuḷatiḷakaṁ © jananutavikramaṁ guṇagaṇāgraṇi nāḷpra bhu nābhiseṭṭigaṁ vanajadaḷāyatākṣi patibhakte mahāsati bhōga
vanadhiparītabhūtaḷada mānavararttiyinoldu baṇnisalkanupamakīrtti puṭṭidanu dāttajayaṁ jayasiṁganettima(nuttama) © paramaṁ pri
vuṁ gaṇapanuṁmādityanuṁ caṁdranuṁ girirājātmaje vāṇiyuṁ negaṟda lakṣmī kānteyuṁ gaṁgeyuṁ surarājaṁ berasaṣṭadikpatigaḷuṁ nāgēṁdranuṁ
rddivarīge kūrttu jayasiṁgaṁgāyumaṁ śrīyumaṁ © jayasiṁga ninage jayamaṁ jayavadhu māḍuttuvirkke jayadhīracayō
ya jayanāma jayaprasanna vidviṣṭajayā [©] Eḍaṟuva parasameyaṁgaḷa naḍapuggiyanaṭṭu tiṁba rakkasa
vaṁ samarasameyadoḷ jayasiṁgaṁ © karavariya piriya neradarī parasameyakarīṁdrakuṁ
nakhadiṁda siṁgamene jayasiṁgaṁ © Antenisida jayasiṁga seṭṭidaṇḍanāyakaṁ
ya śrī svayaṁbhu sōmēśvaradēva rddivyareṁdu binnapaṁge
keṟege bijayaṁgeyduttaradiśābhāga The stone is broken after this.
Digital edition of SII 20.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
